title: MC's Vanilla Enhanced
description: A modpack containing a multitude of mods and resource packs designed to enhance the experience of vanilla Minecraft without sacrificing the feel and nostalgia of the base game.
body:
The purpose of MC's Vanilla Enhanced is to further the experience and enjoyment that can be found with Minecrafts base game. This includes performance enhancing mods that strive to get every frame your PC has to offer, while other mods improve on other aspects, such as animation, sound and quality of life.

I made this originally for myself so I could get my perfect Minecraft vanilla experience and thought I should share it with those who might enjoy it as much as me.

Credits:
Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/
